channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Missing bus shelter, 10th March
item.description:
The bus shelter for the incoming D bus on the Evesham Road was removed during the construction of the cycle way, but has not been replaced.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tewkesbury Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 10th March
item.description:
ENWD CWPH STATS REQUIRED 700 X 500 X 75mm ROAD CLOSURE MARKED X (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This post cover is completely unattached., 10th March
item.description:
This post is outside 4 Larkhay road, it has a cover that protects the wiring. the cover has fallen off completely and needs fixing/securing urgently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Larkhay Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recently resurfaced high street now cracking, 10th March
item.description:
The recently resurfaced high street is already showing signs of cracking just 12 months after being installed. The intial installation what dreadful executed, uneven and discoloured within days. It is now cracked in mutiple areas. As a Freedom of Information request could you please send details of the guarantees that were included in the contract. Many thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 87, High Street, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Several paving slabs raised/broken, 10th March
item.description:
Between 39 Kipling Road and 41 Kipling Road Cheltenham.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Kipling Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on main carriageway New Barn Lane opposite Brymore Avenue, 10th March
item.description:
The pothole is opposite Brymore Avenue and makes it difficult to turn right out of Brymore Avenue and avoid it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 179, New Barn Lane, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
